sections.title: News
sections.description: Curated AI business and investing coverage, kept separate from provider updates.

items.headline: How Roku fits into Fox's future — and what investors are missing about the deal
items.summary: Why it matters: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

items.headline: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
items.summary: Why it matters: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.

items.headline: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
items.summary: Why it matters: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

items.headline: UniQure to seek FDA approval for Huntington's disease gene therapy after previous clash with agency
items.summary: Why it matters: The announcement comes months after UniQure became embroiled in a public debate with FDA leaders over the clinical trial data supporting its application.

items.headline: The private space race is spurring a luxury hotel land grab for Florida oceanfront property
items.summary: Why it matters: The rise of the private space industry, with companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, has spurred demand for commercial real estate on Florida's space coast.

items.headline: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
items.summary: Why it matters: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.
